intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering → UMAP pipeline.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan for processing this sample:

input.title: Scanpy QC and Clustering for Patient 145 Day 0
input.summary: Standard scRNA-seq preprocessing pipeline: QC metrics, filtering, normalization, HVG selection, dimensionality reduction (PCA/UMAP), and Leiden clustering with marker gene identification.
input.rationale: Establish baseline clusters and cell type composition in the day 0 sample before downstream analysis (DE, trajectory, integration with day 7).

steps.title: Load the first sample and calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Extract Patient 145 Day 0 from the combined object, compute n_genes, n_counts, and mitochondrial % from MT- genes

steps.title: Filter cells by QC thresholds
steps.description: Retain cells with n_genes >= 200 and pct_mito < 20%, remove low-quality cells

steps.title: Select highly variable genes
steps.description: Identify ~2000 HVGs; retain for downstream analysis

steps.title: PCA and UMAP reduction
steps.description: PCA on HVGs, UMAP on first 30 PCs for visualization

steps.title: Leiden clustering
steps.description: KNN graph + Leiden community detection (default resolution)

steps.title: Rank cluster markers
steps.description: Wilcoxon rank-sum test for marker genes per cluster

assumptions: Input: the first sample (Patient 145 Day 0) from the registered dataset
QC filters: n_genes >= 200, pct_mito < 20% (standard for PBMCs)
